title: Ethereal Atelier: Angelic Birthday Candles!
author: Global MapleStory
summary: “Ethereal Atelier: Angelic Birthday Candles!” is an official Cash Shop notice from Global MapleStory Official News on 2026-04-24. Its canonical Nexon article and publication metadata are retained for source-backed verification.
